title: After a Controversial Win Last Year, Solo Leveling Takes a Major Setback
content: Even after a year since the second season reached its finale, Solo Leveling has yet to confirm its Season 3. The second season wraps up the fan-favorite Jeju Island Arc, where Jinwoo faces off against the Ant King.
author: ComicBook

title: Yen Press Licenses Fate Rewinder, Fate/Prototype: Fragments of Sky Silver, 6 More Manga
content: Yen Press announced on Saturday at Sakura-Con that it has licensed the following manga for release in English. Yen Press will debut all the below titles in October 2026: From the author of the bittersweet coming-of-age love story featuring all kinds of furry and not-so-furry zodiac animals, Fruits Basket , Natsuki…
author: ANN

title: Ize Press Licenses 4 Webtoons for English Print Release
content: Ize Press, the Korean content imprint of Yen Press , announced the acquisition of four webtoon titles for English print publication at Sakura-Con on Saturday. The releases will begin in late 2026. The licensed titles include Special Civil Servant , On the Way to Meet Mom , Reunion , and Merry Marbling .
author: ANN

title: 31 Years Ago, Gundam Ended Its Best Series (& It Still Needs a Revival)
content: 31 years ago, Mobile Suit Gundam ended its best franchise, and the anime still needs a revival or proper comeback after three decades of fans hoping to see it happen. Mobile Suit Gundam is one of the most influential mecha anime franchises of all time thanks to how much it has influenced the wider world of…
author: ComicBook

title: Manga Mavericks Licenses Hana Ikuta's Oni & Dawn, Minami Q-ta's Ball & Chain Manga
content: Manga Mavericks Books announced at Anime Boston on Saturday that it will release Hana Ikuta 's Oni & Dawn: Bakumatsu High School Girls ( Bakumatsu Joshi Kōsei: Oni to Yoake ) manga and Minami Q-ta 's Ball and Chain manga. Somewhere in Japan, very special students have gathered at Koharu Girls' High School.
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s One Piece Star Teases Luffy & Vivi’s Relationship in Season 3
content: One Piece made some big shake ups to the live-action series when it returned for its second season on Netflix last month , and the star behind Princess Vivi teases how her connection to Monkey D. Luffy is going to change with the next season.
author: ComicBook

title: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes Releases New Promo, And It’s Making Some Big Changes
content: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes might just become one of the biggest, most anticipated sequels that Cartoon Network has ever launched. Arriving almost a decade following the original series finale, the spin-off is planning to bring viewers back to a time when Mordecai and Rigby were still employees of the park under the…
author: ComicBook

title: Naruto Creator Returns for New Surprise Ahead of Anime Revival
content: Naruto ‘s creator has returned to the franchise with a cool surprise as part of a massive comeback for the series. Ever since it kicked off the 20th anniversary of its original TV anime run a few years ago, Naruto has been in the midst of a revival period.
author: ComicBook

title: 28 Years Ago, This Anime Classic Made A Wild Debut You Won’t Recognize (& Still Hasn’t Released in English)
content: 28 years ago today, a classic anime franchise made its debut in a totally unrecognizable kind of way, and it still hasn’t gotten an English language release after all these decades. Kazuki Takahashi’s Yu-Gi-Oh!
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll Confirms Exciting English Dub Release Schedule for Fullmetal Alchemist Replacement
content: Fullmetal Alchemist ‘s creator has a brand new anime adaptation making its debut this April, and Crunchyroll has confirmed some exciting news for fans waiting on the English dub release.
author: ComicBook
